title: My Favorite Games
imageAlt: Asian man with long hair reading on a kindle.
paragraphs: There is a special place in my heart for FromSoft souls games. Each installment is an experiences that captures a unique feeling with their iconic atmosphere and sparse dialogue. You're often alone in a dying world, but it is strangely... peaceful.
Gameplay-wise, the mechanics respect the players ability to learn and adapt, while not going overboard (most of the time).
If I feel strongly about a game, I may also write a blog post about it!
